phantom.name: Rolls-Royce Phantom
phantom.description: The pinnacle of luxury motoring, an icon of automotive excellence and bespoke craftsmanship.

features.title: Magic Carpet Ride
features.desc: Experience a serene and smooth journey with the state-of-the-art self-leveling air suspension that absorbs any road imperfections.

features.title: Starlight Headliner
features.desc: Gaze upon a celestial dreamscape with a custom-made fiber optic roof, creating an illusion of a star-filled night sky.

features.title: Rear Theatre Configuration
features.desc: Entertain your guests with dual 12-inch HD screens, a bespoke audio system, and a center console with a drinks cabinet.

features.title: The Silent Chamber
features.desc: Enjoy unparalleled tranquility within the Phantom's cabin, thanks to over 130kg of sound insulation for a whisper-quiet ride.
